name: Almond Red Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place almonds in a food processor work bowl fitted with a steel blade or in a blender container; cover and process until finely ground.
2. Cook onion and garlic in oil over medium heat, stirring frequently, until onion is tender.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except almonds.
4. Heat to boiling; reduce heat.
5. Simmer for 1 minute, stirring constantly; stir in almonds.
6. Serve hot. Makes about 1 3/4 cups of sauce.
